_comment: Config D: all-local (workers AND judge/aggregator). Tests whether crux-finding survives without a frontier aggregator. Fallback judge is deliberately ANOTHER LOCAL MODEL — a Claude fallback would silently contaminate the all-local condition (qwen3.6:27b passed the bench schema probe; weak, but it only fires on error and is audit-logged). Models chosen per experiments/ollama-bench/results.md. verify_model pins the search-enabled cite-check to Claude; run `python3 -m lenses verify` separately if strict isolation matters for a comparison.
